events.title: v1.13 Stream
events.desc:
# 🎥 v1.13 Dev Stream - 1st April 

v1.13 Throne of Thorns is just around the corner! We'll be live on Twitch next week for a first look at the new update 🌹

Mark it in your calendar and we'll see you in chat!
🗓️01 April | ⏰ 6PM UTC / 2PM ET

🔔 <@&1128995603444150425>

events.title: v1.13
events.desc:
V1.13: Throne of Thorns drops April 7th - very soon 👀

And we’ve got some news to share... here's first of them:

Hero Affinity level cap is increasing all the way to Level 99! 🔥

You asked for it, and it’s finally here. Time to push your mains further than ever before 💪

🔔 <@&1128995603444150425>
